title: The Impossible Mrs. Bellew
writer: Percy Heath, Monte M. Katterjohn, David Lesle
actors: Gloria Swanson, Robert Cain, Conrad Nagel
plot: Lance Bellew ignores his wife, Betty, for his mistress, Naomi Templeton, but becomes so enraged when he finds Betty in the company of Jerry Woodruff that he shoots this family friend. For the good of her son, Betty does not contes...
